dataset_notes.universe: Liquid US-listed ETF trend universe with broad equity, sectors, rates, commodity, and cash proxy sleeves.
dataset_notes.construction_method: Use the common-date intersection across the ETF list and ^SPX benchmark to preserve a broad, stable liquid ETF universe on aligned daily history.
dataset_notes.benchmark: S&P 500 price index (^SPX) close-to-close returns from Stooq.
realism_limitations: benchmark is price index not total return
